
```sql
SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price
FROM products p
WHERE p.price > 1000
ORDER BY p.product_name ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
FROM orders o
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
  AND o.order_date > '2025-03-31'
ORDER BY o.order_date ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity
FROM order_items oi
WHERE oi.unit_price < 200
ORDER BY oi.item_id ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT p.product_name, p.price
FROM products p
ORDER BY p.price DESC, p.product_id ASC
LIMIT 2;
```

```sql
SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE c.city = '上海' AND o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 3;
```

SELECT c.city, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_order_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city
HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) > 1
ORDER BY paid_order_count DESC;

```sql
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE c.level = 'gold'
  AND (p.category LIKE '%电脑%' OR p.category LIKE '%computer%')
ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_spent
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
ORDER BY total_spent DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_order_count
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id AND o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT p.category, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price
FROM products p
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY p.category ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.level, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
FROM customers c
GROUP BY c.level
ORDER BY customer_count DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.customer_name, o.order_id
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status IN ('cancelled', 'canceled')
ORDER BY o.order_id ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
FROM customers c
GROUP BY c.city
ORDER BY c.city ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY o.order_id
ORDER BY o.order_id ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_amount
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_id
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 5000
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE p.category = '家具' AND o.status = 'paid';
```

```sql
SELECT c.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.category) AS category_count
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity) > 5
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT oi.item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS item_total
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
ORDER BY item_total DESC
LIMIT 3;
```

```sql
SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name, o.status
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE lower(o.status) NOT IN ('cancelled', 'canceled')
ORDER BY o.order_id ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT p.category, MAX(oi.unit_price) AS max_unit_price
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY p.category ASC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
```

```sql
SELECT c.level, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.level
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 5000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
```
